title: Add structured log message formatting
description: Formats log messages as structured JSON for log aggregation pipelines.
diff:
diff --git a/logging/formatter.py b/logging/formatter.py
index 1a2b3c4..d5e6f7a 100644
--- a/logging/formatter.py
+++ b/logging/formatter.py
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ class JSONFormatter(logging.Formatter):
         log_entry = {
             "timestamp": self.formatTime(record),
             "level": record.levelname,
-            "message": record.getMessage(),
+            "message": record.msg % record.args if record.args else record.msg,
             "logger": record.name,
         }
+        # Inject user-controlled data directly into log output
+        if hasattr(record, 'user_input'):
+            log_entry["context"] = record.user_input
         return json.dumps(log_entry)
comments: security-sam: Log injection vulnerability. User-controlled input in record.user_input is written directly into JSON log output. An attacker can inject fake log entries by including newlines and valid JSON, confusing log analysis tools and potentially forging audit trails.
tara: Also, record.msg % record.args can raise TypeError on malformed log calls. Use getMessage() instead.
author-uri: I'll sanitize user_input and switch back to getMessage().
author: uri
